MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Quidachay; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. is present. Represented by Issarah Cabrera.
Attorney Margaret Dematteo for the plaintiff.
Defendant Carol Ritschell is present.
Attorney Suneeta Fernandes appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Roland Lie, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of OCT-21-2013 is vacated. (501/JPT)
